rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH CONNELLY VS. ELIZABETH MAGUIRE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 16, 2016, Line 1. DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH MAGUIRE, DANIEL BORNSTEIN, BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. Plaintiff has sufficiently pled facts demonstrating that the prior dismissal of the UD action was in "his favor" and has pled facts by which the Court could infer malice or oppression to sustain a malicious prosecution claim. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY C.D. YIP VS. SON TRUNG LE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 16, 2016, Line 4. PLAINTIFF HENRY YIP'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT LE'S AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED as to the First, Second, Tenth and Twelve Affirmative Defenses with ten days leave to amend. The remaining Affirmative Defenses are sufficiently pled and the demurrer is OVERRULED as to those Affirmative Defenses. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JORGE SAUCEDO VS. JOSHUA RODDY ET AL (**case reclassified as regular civil**)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 16, 2016, Line 6. DEFENDANT JOSHUA RODDY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to allege which of the notices attached to the Complaint serves as the "dominant motive" for seeking such relief. (S.F. Admin. Code § 37.9(a).) Moreover, the complaint is uncertain as to the amount of rent due to cure the notice to pay rent or quit, what agreements were made in the stipulation between the parties, and why Plaintiff is entitled to bring a UD claim as "agent for owner with right of possession." Plaintff may file an amended complaint within five days of the date of the notice of entry of order. =(501/REQ)
